title: Foodopolis
body:
Foodopolis adds 70 new foods to Minecraft!\
From cheeseburgers to sushi, this mod adds almost any food imagineable!\
It even adds drinks, like juices and milkshakes!\
Every item is craftable, so you can use it in survival too.
It also adds a few other things, likes boxes and jars!


A wiki will come soon, so you know the recipes.\
For now, use [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei), [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei), [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) or similar for recipes.

I hope you enjoy!
